name: 4″ Retrofit Recessed Downlight – 9W – 5CCT – ETL
description: Features: 9W Power Consumption: Delivers high efficiency and significant energy savings, lowering utility costs. 750 Lumens Output: Provides bright, effective lighting for any space, enhancing visibility and comfort. 5 Selectable Color Temperatures (CCT): Easily adjustable from warm to cool lighting (2700K-5000K), perfect for various settings like living rooms, kitchens, and offices. 120V Triac Dimming: Smooth, flicker-free dimming ensures a comfortable ambiance tailored to your preference. E26 Adapter: Quick and hassle-free installation with compatibility for standard sockets. High CRI >90Ra: Superior color rendering for more accurate and vibrant lighting, enhancing true color visibility. 100° Wide Beam Angle: Ensures broad coverage for even illumination, eliminating dark spots. Modern White Housing: Sleek, minimalist design that complements any decor. ETL Listed: Ensures safety and quality with certified compliance to industry standards. Energy Star Certified: Proven to meet energy efficiency guidelines, making it an eco-friendly choice for sustainable living.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 9W Lumen Output: 750 lm Color Temperature: 2700K / 3000K / 3500K / 4000K / 5000K (Selectable) Input Voltage: 120VAC Power Factor: ≥0.9 Efficacy: 80 lm/W CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 100° Dimmable: Yes, Triac-compatible Operating Temperature: -20°C to 45°C Housing Material: Aluminum Housing Color: White IP Rating: Damp Rated Lens Type: Frosted Certifications: ETL, Energy Star LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years
